This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

Lyunga loc
QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2004 at 4:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770033467
8 posts
It's very easy to find her. Go to the entrance of Guk...down by the water. She will walk by in a few mins. I saw her walking in the water and was out of agro range...killed her with my Ranger...Easy.
▲ Page top
where is Lyunga
QuoteReply
# Apr 28 2003 at 2:35 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776710790
5 posts
Sence the last expansion came out. I can't find Lyguna in any zone. If you seen her PLEASE POST WHERE.... tks

▲ Page top
RE: where is Lyunga
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2004 at 11:55 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783563575
5 posts
I was running from Guk to the PoK book she started hitting me... BIG mistake... I was playing my 65 Marauder at the time...

So yes she does still spawn in Innothule.
(seen on 8th March 2004 on Antonius Bayle server)

▲ Page top
RE: where is Lyunga
QuoteReply
# Dec 04 2003 at 10:49 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594573378837
Scholar
47 posts
Lyguna spawns in Innothule Swamp, in front of Upper Guk entrance.
Killed her a few times there on Terris-Thule.
▲ Page top
RE: where is Lyunga
QuoteReply
# May 21 2003 at 4:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758796491
90 posts
She is usually near entrance to Guk. She is wandering, though. And not always here...
Pretty hard to find now :(
▲ Page top
Where is kerrpok
QuoteReply
# Sep 26 2002 at 1:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759640207
18 posts
Hey all I spent 2 days camping Yiz Pon (in the NE corner of zone as posted) and never found him. I had several trackers help and no one even saw him on tracking. I did however find the assassin Gnoll. He appeared running due west just pass the Y in the road. Man is that sucker fast! I had SOW and it took me almost all the way to froon to catch the guy, another few feet and I would have to stop because the Cyclops brothers scare me since they cant be mezz’ed and I am a lowly chanter with like 700HP when buffed. Never the less I caught to sob and as posted he was a easy kill even for a lone enchanter. 2 anarchy spells and bye bye.

So while I did not find the posted location of Yiz to be true, it lead me to the Gnoll.

Now I am camped at Paw and I am not sure how to find Kurrpok. I am looking now for a map of paw with his location. I heard he is in the very back of paw. You all that have completed the quest, did you get a group and fight your way back, or invisible and head back to the named MOB? Can Gnolls see invisible? Is there a relatively safe way to get to this guy? Do any enchanter illusions give you fraction enough to just stroll in? What strategies are there for killing him and the 32 level spell caster? Any details you can post would be helpful.

Thanks

Oceana Pacifica
Enchanter of 35th season
Veeshan server

▲ Page top
RE: Where is kerrpok
QuoteReply
# Nov 09 2002 at 11:24 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591778840167
13 posts
If you go to eqatlas.com and print there map out, Kerrpok spawns in the middle of area 3.
Grimstaad
53 Pathfinder
The Seventh Hammer
▲ Page top
Jeweled Skull
QuoteReply
# Oct 30 2001 at 3:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249113945
View User Forum
Scholar
118 posts
I think this would be a good mid-level item to equip. You have the +5 INT which is better than most hand slot items for mid level (20 to 40) without twinking too badly. The Spirit Tome is +6 WIS, +6 INT and has really great graphics, but the 20 HP/Mana would make this better. The DOWNSIDE to holding this, for anyone on Rallos Zek, is that most PKers are Wizards (ICE SPELLS HURT) a negative to any Resist is a no go for equiping. Im going to finish this quest to give to my level 26 mage since I already have her CR at 100 (FR/CR twink) and replace my Crystal Grinder since im doing less melee help and more bombing.
▲ Page top
Equipping this
QuoteReply
# Aug 16 2001 at 1:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757943380
55 posts
I would do this quest if I could equip the skull in the Range slot. It would be a good upgrade over my Sarnak Dagger. I am not going to drop my Staff of the Wheel or Stein of Mogukk for it though.
▲ Page top
do as I did
QuoteReply
# Aug 18 2001 at 3:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757831952
View User Forum
157 posts
Had staff and maggok too. since I raised int to 220 I felt to sacrifice some int for some mana...as you should. I got students homework. in ranged. and got a webshield to secondary and now Im going for this to replace maggok. Hate to loose the svm or svd 25 that maggok has. But skull webshield and homework is a nice combination if u can keep your int over 200
